raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Scht irr ta Semmie/ kaß
ums zaur Eemantofchanu pee-
rittihs preeksch Israëta Behr-
eem/ un schihs laid irr winnu
Teefas / fakka tas Kungs
UNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un schihs laid irr ta Pils-
ahta Rohbeschäs/ no Seemeta-
Bnffes tschetrtuhkſtoſchi un peez-
imts Mehri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Unta Pilsfahta Wahrtis
aid irr pehz teem Waherdeem to
Israëta Zilſchu/ trihs Wahrtis
rett Seemeli / weenas Wahrtis
is no Rubbena/ weenas Wahrtis
is no Juhda/ weenas Wahrtis
o Lewja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un prett Rihteem tschetrt-
uhktſtoſchi un peeznimts Mehri/
n trihs Wahrtis / weenas
Bahrtis no Jahſpa / weenas
Bahrtis no Benjamina / wee-
as Wahrtis no Danna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Prett Deennæ-Widdun
rridsan tschetrtuhkſtoſchi un
eeſfints Mehri / un trihs
Bahrtis/ weenas Wahrtis no
Shimeana/ weenas Wahrtis ne
lhsafbara/ weenas Wahrtis no
Sebulana.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Prett Wakkaru tschetrt-
uhktſtoſchi un peeznimts Mehri/
n trihs Wahrtis /
Bahrtis no Gada /
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wifsapkahrt astonpades-
mits tuhkſtoſchi. Un ta Pills-
fahta Wahrtis buhs no tahs
Deenas: Scheit irr tas Kungs.
Ta Praweeta Ezekeła Gals.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nebukadnezars tas Babeles Rehnisch apleh,
gere Jerufalemi : 1. Wed Jojakimu to Keh,
niu no Juhda ar zitteem Rihkeem ta Dee-
wa Namma us Babeli : 2. Leeſ Danie-
lam un winna Beedreem to Kaldeexu Rak-
ſus un Mollodu mahziht : 3/4. Un pehz to
winzu Sapraschanas un Gadribas deht
pahr ta Rehnixa Leetahu un Amatreem ee-
zelt : 18/19.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kungs nodewe Jo-
jaſimu to Rehnixu no Juhda ,
winnu Rohka/ un zittus Dee-
wa Namma Rihkus/ un wiꞥſch
wedde tohs us Sineara Semmi
fawa Deewa Namma/ un tohs
Rihkus ſſke wiꞥſch fawa Dee-
wa Mantu Schkirsta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Rehnisch fazzija
us Aspenafu fawn Kambar-Jun-
karo Uſraugu / fa tam bij no
teem Israëta Behrnceem/ no Keh-
niu
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
